svg.title: MHA → GQA/MQA → MLA: Attention KV-Cache Compression
svg.desc: Three columns comparing Multi-Head Attention (MHA), Grouped/Multi-Query Attention (GQA/MQA), and Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA). MHA has one KV head per query head (large cache). GQA/MQA shares a few KV heads across many query heads (smaller cache). MLA compresses KV into a single low-rank latent vector, decompressed on use (smallest cache).

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: MLA requires training from scratch; GQA/MQA needs architectural support at training time; both save HBM at serving.
